data.name: S.H.E.L.T.E.R. - An Apocalyptic Tale
data.detailed_description:
Set in a post-apocalyptic world where you, together with a few other survivors, are lucky enough to find a new home in the form of a modern shelter.

It has enough supplies to provide life for over a century, but sometimes it makes you wonder about what lies beyond it.

  • Become the mayor of the settlement and improve lives of your loyal citizens.

  • Survive in a post-apocalyptic world and build relationships with other survivors.

  • Make choices that will shape your character’s personality and the world around him.

  • Romance or corrupt 10 different characters.

  • Experience over 100 sex scenes.
data.about_the_game:
Set in a post-apocalyptic world where you, together with a few other survivors, are lucky enough to find a new home in the form of a modern shelter.

It has enough supplies to provide life for over a century, but sometimes it makes you wonder about what lies beyond it.

  • Become the mayor of the settlement and improve lives of your loyal citizens.

  • Survive in a post-apocalyptic world and build relationships with other survivors.

  • Make choices that will shape your character’s personality and the world around him.

  • Romance or corrupt 10 different characters.

  • Experience over 100 sex scenes.
data.short_description: A post-apocalyptic, adults only Visual Novel, where you and your choices will shape the future of humanity and those around you. Engage in meaningful relationships with the characters or bring them to depravity.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 or Kernel 3.x+ distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
